name: api-common
description: Claude Code skill for the @rtorcato/api-* packages — small, single-purpose libraries for building Node.js APIs on Express, Hono, or framework-agnostic.

plugins.name: api-common
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to use @rtorcato/api-* correctly: the base-vs-adapter package split, framework peer-deps, the api-errors throw/handler contract, and the api-response success envelope.
